statements.__comment: This is a clean-up statement to remove custom attributes
statements.query: MATCH (:CloudanixWorkspace{id: $WORKSPACE_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:GCPOrganization{id:$GCP_ORGANIZATION_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:GCPProject{id: $GCP_PROJECT_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(cluster:GKECluster) WHERE cluster.basic_auth IS NOT NULL REMOVE cluster.basic_auth return COUNT(*) as TotalCompleted

MATCH (:CloudanixWorkspace{id: $WORKSPACE_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:GCPOrganization{id:$GCP_ORGANIZATION_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:GCPProject{id: $GCP_PROJECT_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(cluster:GKECluster) WHERE (cluster.masterauth_username IS NOT NULL AND NOT cluster.masterauth_username = '') AND (cluster.masterauth_password IS NOT NULL AND NOT cluster.masterauth_password = '') SET cluster.basic_auth = true
